name: Insurance denied my on-job forklift claim now what?
description: Appeal denial in 30 days to ALJ with stronger evidence.[3]

mainEntity.name: Insurance denied my on-job forklift claim now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal denial in 30 days to ALJ with stronger evidence.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Request a hearing within 30 days before an administrative law judge.** Utah Labor Commission handles appeals.[3] Key factors: Gather more evidence like doctor notes, challenge denial reasons (e.g., not work-related). Follow all medical instructions to avoid suspension.[3] Hire an attorney experienced in comp hearings for subpoenas and cross-exam.
